shadows.name: tactical-glow
shadows.purpose: Active status or selected icon glow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button with tactile feedback.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #6366f1; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 900; border: none; font-size: 14px; transition: background 0.18s, transform 0.1s; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Card
components.description: Standard container for content with depth.
components.html:
Monolith Header

Atmospheric content with glass depth.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; color: #fff; } .ds-title { font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 18px; } .ds-body { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview: MangaDock utilize a layered aesthetic philosophy that adapts to the user's current task: Cinematic Canvas for reading, Polished Monolith for interaction, and Tactical Terminal for status.
dos: Do use backdrop-blur-md on all floating surfaces.
donts: Don't use emojis for primary navigation.
Don't use childish, oversaturated primary colors.
